allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v['version']\) for k,v in d.get\('packages',{}\).items\(\) if 'esbuild' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v.get\('version',''\)\) for k,v in d.get\('packages',{}\).items\(\) if 'esbuild' in k.lower\(\)]")
